g.text: C4 Level 4 — High Availability & Health-Check Chain
Both backends start only after DB + Redis pass health checks
Zero downtime achieved via passive failover
Both instances are STATELESS (JWT auth, shared PG+Redis)
→ Any instance can handle any request
→ restart: unless-stopped guards against crash loops
Two instances share load; Caddy compresses responses;
Redis cache avoids expensive DB aggregations
